# `mix` (elixir ecosystem)

<!-- The reference table below this banner is regenerated by `make generate`. Handwritten prose below the table lives in internal/support/prose/. -->

Bomly uses this chain when it finds `mix` evidence.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package manager | `mix` |
| Ecosystem | `elixir` |
| Detector chain | `mix-detector`, `syft-detector` |
| Evidence patterns | `mix.lock`, `mix.exs` |
| Install-first support | No |
| Native command hints | `mix`, `syft for bomly-lite` |
